summary: Pre-bound companyId path for /api/companies/{companyId}/issues/list and /api/issues/list endpoints. Auto-resolves companyId from the local companies cache when not supplied on the command line, so single-tenant dogfood runs without an explicit --companyId flag.
reason: Path binding in the generator emits the literal {companyId} token; pre-binding it from the cached single-tenant row keeps the read flow ergonomic for the self-hosted topology.
validated_outcome: shipcheck green; 801 passed, 0 failed, 1306 skipped against paperclip.example.test (full live dogfood, --level full).
